metadata.title: Posty — AI Social Media Scheduler
metadata.description: Schedule your social posts with AI-powered content creation

auth.subtitle: Schedule smarter with AI
auth.signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
auth.configError: Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local, then restart the dev server.
auth.networkError: Could not reach Supabase. Check your credentials and internet connection.

dashboard.chatPlaceholder: Ask Claude to create or schedule a post...
dashboard.chatWelcome: Hi! I'm Claude. Tell me what you'd like to post and I'll help you schedule it.
dashboard.chatError: Could not reach Claude. Please try again.
dashboard.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
dashboard.chatReplyPost: I can help you craft that post! Which platform should we target, and what's the main message?
dashboard.chatReplySchedule: I'll set that up for you. What date and time works best?
dashboard.chatReplyStats: Your best performing platform this week is TikTok with 45.2k views. Want a detailed breakdown?
dashboard.chatReplyDefault: Got it! Tell me more about the content you'd like to create or schedule.
dashboard.profileSubtitle: Manage your profile and account settings.
dashboard.accountsSubtitle: Link your social media accounts to schedule and publish posts.
dashboard.instagramInvalidState: Instagram authorization failed. Please try again.
dashboard.instagramNoBusinessAccount: No Instagram Business account found. Link one to a Facebook Page first.
dashboard.instagramNotConfigured: Instagram OAuth is not configured on the server.
dashboard.instagramSaveFailed: Could not save Instagram account. Run the Supabase migration first.
dashboard.youtubeInvalidState: YouTube authorization failed. Please try again.
dashboard.youtubeNoChannel: No YouTube channel found for this Google account.
dashboard.youtubeNotConfigured: YouTube OAuth is not configured on the server.
dashboard.youtubeSaveFailed: Could not save YouTube account. Run the Supabase migration first.
dashboard.instagramSavePermission: Could not save Instagram account. Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel and run the GRANT SQL in Supabase.
dashboard.youtubeSavePermission: Could not save YouTube account. Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel and run the GRANT SQL in Supabase.
dashboard.instagramSaveUnknown: Could not save Instagram account. Check Vercel logs or open /api/setup/connected-accounts while logged in.
dashboard.instagramServiceRoleMissing: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel environment variables, then redeploy.
dashboard.youtubeSaveUnknown: Could not save YouTube account. Check Vercel logs or open /api/setup/connected-accounts while logged in.
dashboard.youtubeServiceRoleMissing: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel environment variables, then redeploy.
dashboard.disconnectFailed: Could not disconnect this account. Try again.
dashboard.facebookInvalidState: Facebook authorization failed. Please try again.
dashboard.facebookNoPage: No Facebook Page found. Create a Page and try again.

dashboard.facebookSaveFailed: Could not save Facebook account. Run the Supabase setup SQL first.
dashboard.facebookSavePermission: Could not save Facebook account. Check SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY on Vercel.
dashboard.facebookSaveUnknown: Could not save Facebook account. Try again or check /api/setup/connected-accounts.
dashboard.facebookServiceRoleMissing: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel, then redeploy.
dashboard.facebookTokenFailed: Facebook authorization could not be completed.

dashboard.threadsNotConfigured: Threads OAuth is not configured on the server.
dashboard.threadsSaveFailed: Could not save Threads account. Run the Supabase setup SQL first.
